steps.title: Identify the clause structures
steps.content: The clause before the blank ends with a complete thought – '... have won the prestigious World Fantasy Award' – making it an independent clause. The clause after the blank begins with 'the works received the honor...' which is also an independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the semicolon rule
steps.content: A semicolon separates two independent clauses; therefore choice B ('Award;') correctly joins the clauses. Choices A, C, and D either use only a comma, lack needed punctuation, or omit the conjunction needed for a comma+and structure, creating a comma splice or run-on. That matches choice B — B is correct.
